message:
docs: add architecture documentation and verification artifacts for sections 10.15 and 10.16

- artifacts/10.14/sweep_policy_trajectory.csv: Sweep policy telemetry
  showing scheduling intervals and repair queue depths over time.
- artifacts/10.16/: Initial verification artifacts for the section 10.16
  durability and degraded-mode track.
- artifacts/section_10_15/: Per-bead verification evidence for the
  delta moonshots execution track.
- artifacts/section_10_16/: Per-bead verification evidence for the
  durability and degraded-mode track.
- docs/architecture/: Architecture documentation describing module
  relationships, trust flow diagrams, and epoch lifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
